title: Extend Conditional GO cycle with coverage release and cleanup
outOfScope: Implementing the eight production remediation Work Items
Changing release or quality implementation in this plan-revision Work Item
Deleting archived Contract or Summary evidence

sources.reason: Existing Conditional GO cycle plan to extend with coverage, release, and final cleanup gates.
Defines lifecycle closure and preservation of archived Work Item evidence.

riskAssessment.reason: The plan must add a measurable coverage threshold, a real-version release gate, and a final cleanup step without deleting audit evidence.

executionDecision.reason: The user explicitly requested these additions to the existing execution plan.

preReviewWarnings: Confirm that 85% is a hard gate, release publication is human-gated, and only the plan Markdown is deleted at final cleanup.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The existing cycle plan includes a hard minimum total quality coverage of 85%.
The existing cycle plan includes a final release Work Item with version, evidence, and publication gates.
The existing cycle plan includes a last cleanup Work Item that deletes only the plan Markdown after all child Work Items and release completion succeed.
The plan explicitly preserves archived Contracts and Summaries as immutable audit evidence.
guidelines: Treat 85% total coverage as a blocking threshold; do not lower the threshold or exclude tests to pass it.
Do not claim a new version is published without release workflow, asset, smoke, and public verification evidence.
Delete only the plan Markdown at final cleanup; retain archived Work Item Contracts, Summaries, and generated audit index entries.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
